message:
chore(deps): remove test-internals feature from asupersync dependency

Drop the "test-internals" feature flag from the asupersync dependency
in Cargo.toml. This feature exposes internal runtime APIs intended only
for asupersync's own test suite and is not needed by pi_agent_rust.
Removing it reduces compilation scope and avoids depending on unstable
internal APIs that may change between asupersync releases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
